issues.title: push_idempotency + push_sent anon-readable and anon-writable in production
issues.description: Anon role with the published key can SELECT/INSERT/DELETE on public.push_idempotency (323 rows visible) and public.push_sent (182 rows visible). Enables emergency push suppression (idempotency-key pre-claim short-circuits push-notify), timed-reminder suppression (pre-insert push_sent dedup rows), and family-activity enumeration. Verified live with 201 INSERT and 204 DELETE on both tables (probe rows cleaned up). Migration code for push_sent declares ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY + USING (false) -> production state has drifted. Migration code for push_idempotency never declares RLS at all.

issues.title: push_idempotency migration never enables RLS
issues.description: 20260421103838_push_idempotency_table.sql creates the table without ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY and without any CREATE POLICY. Root-cause source for F-001 column 1.

issues.title: subscription-reconcile Edge Function lacks JWT verification
issues.description: POST handler opens a service-role Supabase client and fans out to up to 100 stale subscriptions per call without any auth gate. Denial-of-wallet vector on Qonversion API and DB writes.

issues.title: ai-voice-parse accepts unauthenticated callers
issues.description: No getClaims() check; body is forwarded to OpenAI chat/completions. Image mode escalates to gpt-4o. Trivial OpenAI-key cost abuse + free image inference relay.

issues.title: Realtime publication coverage for audit/safety tables NOT_VERIFIED
issues.description: No ALTER PUBLICATION add for location_history, remote_listen_sessions, sos_events. Acceptable if client does not subscribe via postgres_changes; cannot verify statically.

issues.title: QONVERSION_ALLOW_UNSIGNED_WEBHOOKS env override exists
issues.description: qonversion-webhook/index.ts:23 - if env=1, signature verification is bypassed. Cannot read function env via anon. Marked NOT_VERIFIED.

issues.title: Four post-Phase-1 migrations missing paired down files
issues.description: Convention violation per supabase/migrations/down/README.md Rule 1. None destructive - operational debt only.

issues.title: feedback-email is open relay to admin inbox
issues.description: No JWT check, no rate limit, CORS *. Spam + Resend cost abuse.

blocking_reasons: F-001 (P0): anon RLS bypass on push_idempotency and push_sent enables emergency-push suppression on a children-safety product
